question.label: The real version
question.name: Tell me about your week — the real version.
question.description: Kim Scott's 'care personally' made concrete. Signals that a performed answer won't cut it.

answer: Its been okay, we had team building and now new OE's are coming on board its great

assessment.note: Describes the week as okay-to-good with team building and new joiners landing positively, which is mild positive wellbeing and engagement.
